# Rosalind Problem: Find Patterns Forming Clumps in a String (Ada Solution)

## Problem Understanding

We need to find all k-mers that appear at least t times within a sliding window of size L in a DNA string.

## Solution Approach

1. Read the input DNA string, k, L, and t
2. Slide a window of size L across the DNA string
3. For each window, count occurrences of each k-mer
4. Collect k-mers that appear at least t times in any window
5. Output the results

## Ada Implementation

```ada
with Ada.Text_IO; use Ada.Text_IO;
with Ada.Integer_Text_IO; use Ada.Integer_Text_IO;
with Ada.Strings.Unbounded; use Ada.Strings.Unbounded;
with Ada.Containers.Vectors;

procedure Find_Patterns_Forming_Clumps is
   
   type K_Mer_Count is record
      k_mer : Unbounded_String;
      count : Integer;
   end record;
   
   package K_Mer_Vectors is new Ada.Containers.Vectors (Positive, K_Mer_Count);
   use K_Mer_Vectors;
   
   -- Function to get substring from position start with length len
   function Get_Substring(Str : Unbounded_String; Start : Positive; Len : Positive) return Unbounded_String is
      Result : Unbounded_String;
   begin
      for I in 1..Len loop
         Append(Result, Element(Str, Start + I - 1));
      end loop;
      return Result;
   end Get_Substring;
   
   -- Function to count occurrences of a pattern in a string
   function Count_Pattern(Pattern : Unbounded_String; Text : Unbounded_String) return Integer is
      Pattern_Len : constant Positive := Length(Pattern);
      Text_Len : constant Positive := Length(Text);
      Count : Integer := 0;
   begin
      for I in 1..Text_Len - Pattern_Len + 1 loop
         if Get_Substring(Text, I, Pattern_Len) = Pattern then
            Count := Count + 1;
         end if;
      end loop;
      return Count;
   end Count_Pattern;
   
   -- Function to check if a k-mer is already in the result list
   function Is_In_List(K_Mer : Unbounded_String; List : Vector) return Boolean is
   begin
      for I in 1..Length(List) loop
         if Element(List, I).k_mer = K_Mer then
            return True;
         end if;
      end loop;
      return False;
   end Is_In_List;
   
   -- Main function to find clumps
   procedure Find_Clumps(DNA : Unbounded_String; K : Integer; L : Integer; T : Integer) is
      DNA_Len : constant Positive := Length(DNA);
      Result_List : Vector;
      Window_Start : Positive := 1;
      Window_End : Positive := L;
      Temp_List : Vector;
      Found : Boolean;
   begin
      -- Check if window size is valid
      if L > DNA_Len then
         Put_Line("Window size larger than DNA string");
         return;
      end if;
      
      -- Slide the window across the DNA string
      while Window_End <= DNA_Len loop
         -- Get current window
         declare
            Current_Window : Unbounded_String := Get_Substring(DNA, Window_Start, L);
         begin
            -- Count k-mers in current window
            for I in 1..L - K + 1 loop
               declare
                  K_Mer : Unbounded_String := Get_Substring(Current_Window, I, K);
                  Count : Integer;
               begin
                  Count := Count_Pattern(K_Mer, Current_Window);
                  
                  -- If count is at least T, add to temporary list if not already there
                  if Count >= T then
                     Found := False;
                     for J in 1..Length(Temp_List) loop
                        if Element(Temp_List, J).k_mer = K_Mer then
                           Found := True;
                           exit;
                        end if;
                     end loop;
                     
                     if not Found then
                        declare
                           New_Element : K_Mer_Count;
                        begin
                           New_Element.k_mer := K_Mer;
                           New_Element.count := Count;
                           Append(Temp_List, New_Element);
                        end;
                     end if;
                  end if;
               end;
            end loop;
         end;
         
         -- Move window
         Window_Start := Window_Start + 1;
         Window_End := Window_End + 1;
      end loop;
      
      -- Output results (unique k-mers that form clumps)
      for I in 1..Length(Temp_List) loop
         Put_Line(To_String(Element(Temp_List, I).k_mer));
      end loop;
   end Find_Clumps;
   
   -- Read input from standard input
   DNA : Unbounded_String;
   K : Integer;
   L : Integer;
   T : Integer;
   
begin
   -- Read the DNA string
   Get_Line(DNA);
   
   -- Read k, L, T values
   Get(K);
   Get(L);
   Get(T);
   
   -- Find and output clumps
   Find_Clumps(DNA, K, L, T);
   
end Find_Patterns_Forming_Clumps;
```

## Example Usage

For input:
```
